summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Intentio Nova Italian corporate website - backend APIs, frontend sections, contact form, and mobile responsiveness

minor_bugs.issue: Backend accepts privacy_consent: false instead of validating it must be true
minor_bugs.impact: Form submissions allowed without proper privacy consent

passed_tests: All page sections load correctly (Hero, Trust, Services, Situations, Human-AImpact, Method, Partners, Results, Contact, Footer)
Header sticky navigation and logo display
Header CTA button links to contact section
Service cards display properly with 3 service offerings
Human-AImpact section displays with dark background
Partner cards for Kitsap and Ariadne with working external links
Contact form renders all required fields (nome, azienda, ruolo, email, telefono, area_interesse dropdown, obiettivo textarea, tempistiche dropdown, privacy checkbox)
Contact form submission works successfully with success message
Backend POST /api/contact endpoint accepts submissions and returns success
External links open correctly (kit-sap.com, ariadne.training, intentionova.ch)
Mobile responsiveness works perfectly (mobile menu, form interactions)
Situations section displays 6 typical scenario pills
Results section displays 4 observable outcome cards
Form validation works for required fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix backend privacy consent validation to ensure privacy_consent field must be true (currently accepts false values). This is a minor validation issue.
